summary: Tested auction watchlist feature (4 new endpoints) and verified existing auction/bidding functionality. Fixed 2 bugs: route ordering issue for /watchlist endpoint and datetime comparison error in /activity endpoint. All 14 backend tests pass. Frontend Live Auctions carousel and auction detail page working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering in auctions.py - /watchlist must be defined BEFORE /{auction_id} to avoid FastAPI route conflict
Fixed datetime comparison in get_auction_activity() - timestamps from MongoDB may be offset-naive, added timezone handling

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Live Auctions carousel, auction detail, bidding UI all working)

seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test user and seeded auctions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auction watchlist feature fully tested and working. 4 endpoints verified: POST /api/auctions/watch (add to watchlist), DELETE /api/auctions/watch/{id} (remove), GET /api/auctions/watchlist (get user's watchlist), GET /api/auctions/{id}/activity (get bidding activity). notify_watchlist_users() function is called asynchronously on each bid to alert watchers when bidding heats up (3+ bids in 5 mins). Route ordering fix applied - static routes must come before parameterized routes in FastAPI.

mocked_apis.CherryHub: MOCKED - CherryHub membership API uses mock mode
mocked_apis.Push Notifications: MOCKED on web preview - requires real Expo push tokens from mobile app

watchlist_add.details: Add auction to watchlist with notify_on_bid, notify_on_ending, notify_threshold options

watchlist_remove.details: Remove auction from watchlist, returns success:false if not in watchlist

watchlist_get.details: Get user's watchlist enriched with current auction data (current_bid, status, bid_count)

auction_activity.details: Get recent bidding activity with bids_last_5_mins, bids_last_30_mins, is_hot, activity_level

bidding_with_watchlist.details: Bidding still works correctly with watchlist integration. notify_watchlist_users() called on each bid

live_auctions_carousel.details: Home page shows LIVE AUCTIONS section with horizontal carousel, LIVE badges, current bids

auction_detail_page.details: Auction detail shows countdown timer, current bid, min increment, deposit, bid buttons, auto-bid option

route_ordering.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - /{auction_id} was defined before /watchlist, so 'watchlist' was being matched as an auction_id

datetime_comparison.root_cause: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes - MongoDB timestamps may be offset-naive
datetime_comparison.fix: Added is_recent_bid() helper function that makes timestamps timezone-aware before comparison
